roa.docketEntryComment: Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
DEF MOT FOR FORMAL BAIL HEARING AND ORDER RELEASING DEF ON OR FILED
DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL: ACM ELIGIBLITY REPORT AND TO SET DISMISSAL/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD: SUBMIT TO A DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY A SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/WEAP/CTORD: ENTER AND REMAIN IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT AND RESIDE AT THE WARFIELD HOTEL/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: DISMISSAL/DOP/
/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS/DAWT/VD:DISMISSAL DATE OF 04-23-21/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT & TO SET DISMISSAL/DOP/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT RETURN/DEF: IS 4011,5 TODAY AND UNABLE TO COME TO COURT/X: THE COURT ORDERS THE SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT DISCHARGED/SHER/BAIL:25,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: CONFIRM DISM DATE OF 04-23-21/

/CAL:HEARING ON ACM RELEASE/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO BE RELEASED TO ACM ONLYWHEN BED BECOMES AVAILABLE AT ARESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/NALC/RX/WEAP/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN WITHIN INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY A SFSD SWORN EMPLOYEE/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM WHEN BED IS AVAILABLE, PER SF PTD NOTIFICATION/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:TRIAL DATE OF 04-09-21 IN DEPARTMENT 22 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT & DEF BAIL HRG/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 04-23-21/987,2/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/WIT SWORN:STEVEN LIN, SFPD/EXHMA:PEO 1) CD/EXHMA:PEO 1A & 1B) VIDEO FILES/EXHMA:PEO 2) PHOTOS/EXHM:DEF A) CD/X:DEFENSE 17B MOTION IS DENIED/ARG&SUB/X:THE MOTION TO SUPPRESSIS DENIED/HTA1:1/X:THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT IN VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 148,10 AS A MISDEMEANOR TO CONFORM TO PROOF AS COUNT 5/X:MISDEMEANOR COUNTS 2, 3 & 5 ARE CERTIFIED/871D:4/BAIL:10,000/DEFTCUST3/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 03-05-21 (30TH)/SHER/BAIL: 10000/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSIONFOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/SA2: 170 HAWTHORNE STREET, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/
/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS/X:DEFENDANT REFUSES TO COME TO COURT TODAY/CONT/DOPC
/CAL:STAT OF ACM PROGRAM/LD:04-23-21/CONTD:HRG ON ACM RELEAES/
